title: Thank You…
excerpt: ... so much. For so many things. For all the well wishes on the little one in my ever expanding belly, on coming to this blog when you do, and for supporting my creative endeavors by purchasing and using Amy…
body: ... so much. For so many things. For all the well wishes on the little one in my ever expanding belly, on coming to this blog when you do, and for supporting my creative endeavors by purchasing and using Amy Tangerine products in your projects. You all rule. I worked on a sketch guest post for the super talented Shimelle. I'd like to think that potty person wood veneer represents me without hair. You can see the full layout here.
